# Design Reference Shortlist

- `selected` / `adopt` / `https://example.com/timeline-shell`
  - notes: 3-pane shell, strong hierarchy, desktop density.
- `selected` / `adopt` / `https://example.com/activity-density`
  - notes: dense event list, restrained status emphasis, clear orientation.
- `selected` / `avoid` / `https://example.com/modal-heavy-monitor`
  - notes: modal-first drilldown harms context retention.
- `rejected` / `adopt` / `https://example.com/dashboard-card-maze`
  - notes: card maze loses timeline scanability.
- `rejected` / `avoid` / `https://example.com/ornamental-hero`
  - notes: decorative hero layout mismatches desktop observability use case.
